Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Jun-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Jun-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Matt Gonzalez, Esq. for Petitioner: Silvia Lawrence, present as Guardian at litem for: Maurice A. Wilson, Edward McCall, Arion McCall and Maurice Christopher Wilson, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as to each minor as follows:
-Maurice A. Wison: net balance of $20,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
For purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit " A". as to Minors:
-Edward McCall: net balance of $18,400.00,
-Arion McCall: net balance of $16,200.00
-Maurice Christopher Wilson: net balance of $33,140.00
Counsel to prepare Order.

June 21, 2006 2:00 P.M.
Orders submitted.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MINI MINUTES: Date: March 13, 2006; Dept. 304

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE:

Present; Judge Richard A. Kramer, Court Clerk Jose Rios-Merida, Plaintiffs' attorneys Matt Gonzalez and Trent J. Thornley, Defendants' attorneys Marte J. Bassi and Noel Edlin. Procedings not reported.

Court and counsel confer. No settlement is reached. This action is continued to March 14, 2006 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 304 for further settlement conference. Should the action not settle, counsel shall report to Dept. 206, Master Calendar, forthwith on March 14, 2006, for trial assignment.
